---
title: "其他 — Miscellaneous"
---

## 教學講義 Handouts

- [DB-OTO 基因治療先天性耳聾 教學講義.md](DB-OTO 基因治療先天性耳聾 教學講義.md)
- [Military_Service_Dongyin_2005.md](Military_Service_Dongyin_2005.md)
- [NEJM Clinical Problem-Solving The Eyes Have It — 肉毒桿菌中毒 教學講義.md](NEJM Clinical Problem-Solving The Eyes Have It — 肉毒桿菌中毒 教學講義.md)
- [dietary-intervention-literature-review.md](dietary-intervention-literature-review.md)

## LaTeX Files

- Dan Koe How to Fix Your Life 2026 教學講義.tex
- Dan Koe How to Fix Your Life 2026 通用版.tex
- Dietary Natural Approaches Stroke Prevention 2025 教學講義.tex
- Military_Service_Dongyin_2005.tex
- NEJM Case 1-2025.tex
- NEJM Case 4-2026 HIV PJP 教學講義.tex
- Nature News EAST Fusion 2026 科普講義.tex
- 醫法倫_討論_謝慕揚.tex
